case_title: KNOX, LUTHER VS ONYX / CAPITAL ONE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY KNOX, LUTHER AS TO DEFENDANT ONYX / CAPITAL ONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO FEB-15-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
PLFT'S TRIAL BRIEF FILED ONLY. FORWARDED TO ROOM 506.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-08-2007, OFF CALENDAR
CERTIFIED MAIL SENT TO ONYX/CAPITAL ONE RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-15-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-23-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED TO 3/23/07 AT 1:30 P.M. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF ERIN COSTA FOR DEFENDANT ONYX ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION IN RESPONSE TO PLAINTIFFS CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KNOX, LUTHER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ONYX / CAPITAL ONE $1,640.58 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,725.58, DEFENDANT, SHALL WITHIN 10 DAYS OF THIS JUDGMENT, TENDER TO PLAINTIFF CLEAR TITLE + REGISTRATION TO THE SUBJECT VEHICLE; AND WITHIN 30 DAYS OF JUDGMENT, TAKE ALL ACTION NECESSARY TO CLEAR PLAINTIFF'S CREDIT RECORD OF ANY NEGATIVE INFORMATION RELATED TO THE LOAN WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF THIS ACTION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
